title: Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website of Deendayal Port Authority. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DPA Senior Marine Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Marine Engineer/AGM/Chief Engineer (Marine) with 3 years' regular service in pay scale of Rs. 70000-200000
qualification.details: Marine Engineer/AGM/Chief Engineer (Marine) with 3 years' regular service in pay scale of Rs. 70000-200000

selection_process: Promotion through composite method DPC at Port level Merit based on ACRs (benchmark Very Good)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Deendayal Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Marine Engineer post is 02 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Marine Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Senior Marine Engineer position in the Deendayal Port Authority recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Marine Engineers/AGM/Chief Engineers (Marine) with at least 3 years of regular service in the pay scale of Rs. 70000-200000 to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Marine Engineer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Marine Engineer post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Marine Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Marine Engineer position will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 80000 to Rs. 220000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Marine Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves promotion through a composite method, DPC at the Port level, and merit based on ACRs, with a benchmark of 'Very Good'.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Deputation job type within the Deendayal Port Authority.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Deendayal Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Deendayal Port Authority is located in Gandhidham, Gujarat, with the pincode 370201.
